prompt: Style the Approve button in the Control Tower to match Dash purple brand
expected_avoid: MUI sx={{ bgcolor: '#5e2aac' }} with raw hex
antd Button type='primary' with raw color override
shadcn variant='default' (wrong API on Dash Button)
expected_use: Tailwind semantic class bg-primary / text-primary from @dash/base-theme
if MUI/antd Button must stay on the page, use the lib's own theme primary token (not raw hex)
expected_pattern_ref: Token usage (rules L192-227); Brand token (rules L218-219); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Hardcode hex color' (rules L335); next-basecamp-web brand `#5e2aac` (rules L417)
context_notes: Three theme systems coexist (MUI, antd, Tailwind+Dash tokens). Whichever button library wins the row must reach for that lib's brand token — never an inline hex. Canonical Dash Purple = `#5e2aac` (matches DS token `--dash-purple-500`); older `#7C4FC4` references are deprecated (synced 2026-05-20).
